data.title: Ontex to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026 at 07:00 CEST. Webcast at 12:00 CET for investors. Replay available for one year.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, Ontex Group NV, a top global developer and manufacturer of personal care items, announced that they will disclose their fourth quarter and full year outcomes for 2025 at 07:00 CEST / 06:00 BST on February 12, 2026. An investor and analyst webcast will be held the same day at 12:00 CET / 11:00 BT for interested parties. The webcast link to attend the presentation is https://ontexgroup.engagestream.companywebcast.com/25q4_fy_results_call. A replay of the webcast will be accessible on the same link shortly after the live presentation concludes and will remain available for one year.

data.title: ERM partners with Auquan to improve sustainability insights for investors using AI agents.
data.description: In a joint effort in London and New York, ERM is utilizing Auquan's AI agents to improve the velocity, scope, and profundity of sustainability analysis it provides to its institutional investor customers.

data.title: Cobra partners with Airsys to expand two-way radio solutions in Europe, enhancing PMR446 distribution.
data.description: In Chicago on January 28, 2026, Cobra made an announcement through PRNewswire regarding their partnership with Airsys as a distribution partner. This move aligns with Cobra's dedication to collaborating with top-tier organizations in the industry. Airsys, a reputable distributor known for high-end PMR446 communication solutions, will now be working with Cobra in this capacity.

data.title: Oxford tops list; Ireland & Portugal improve; 4 new entries in top-50 QS World University Rankings: Europe.
data.description: According to the latest QS World University Rankings: Europe by QS Quacquarelli Symonds, Oxford University has been ranked as number one. Ireland and Portugal have shown significant improvement with their universities making it to the most improved list. The rankings also welcomed four new entries in the top 50 universities. This update was released on January 28, 2026, in London.

data.title: New IRS-authorized add-on for ezAccounting 2026 simplifies Form 941 submissions, aiming to transform tax filing processes. Jan 28, 2026 announcement.
data.description: A recent development in electronic filing is simplifying Form 941 submissions for businesses and HR professionals using ezAccounting 2026 and the new efile service add-on. The software provider, Halfpricesoft.com, based in REDMOND, Wash., shared on Jan. 28, 2026, that they now offer an IRS-authorized Form 941 efile option. This update aims to enhance efficiency in tax-related procedures and reduce manual workload.

data.title: AvAir wins Parts Supplier of the Year award for record sixth year at Aviation 100 Awards. Leadership in industry affirmed.
data.description: The Aviation 100 Awards, presented by Airline Economics, have acknowledged the top performers in the aerospace sector. AvAir, a provider of inventory solutions for the aviation aftermarket based in Chandler, Arizona, has reinforced its industry leadership by securing the award for the sixth consecutive year. This recognition highlights AvAir's continued excellence and success within the industry. The award ceremony took place on January 28, 2026.

data.title: Havis to exhibit technology solutions at EuroShop 2026 in Germany from Feb 22-26, 2026, at Hall 5, Booth C25.
data.description: Join Havis at EuroShop 2026 in Hall 5, Booth C25 from February 22 to 26, 2026, in Düsseldorf, Germany. Based in WARMINSTER, Pa., on Jan. 28, 2026, Havis, a leading supplier of durable mounting, mobility, and power products, is set to exhibit its wide range of offerings at EuroShop 2026, the global event...

data.title: 130,000+ people register as organ donors through MyChart, boosting organ, eye, tissue donation.
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, as of January 28, 2026, the organization Donate Life America (DLA) revealed that over 130,000 individuals have officially enrolled to be organ, eye, and tissue donors utilizing MyChart. MyChart is recognized as the leading patient portal across the nation. This milestone signifies the significant impact of DLA's partnership with the platform in increasing donor registrations.

data.title: The Shaw Prize Foundation expands after two decades by introducing The Shaw Prize in Computer Science to recognize groundbreaking innovations.
data.description: In Hong Kong on January 28, 2026, the Shaw Prize Foundation disclosed plans for its largest expansion in more than 20 years by introducing The Shaw Prize in Computer Science. This new award category aims to recognize groundbreaking achievements in the field of computer science, which is at the forefront of reshaping industries. The foundation's decision marks a significant milestone and demonstrates its commitment to acknowledging innovative contributions in this rapidly evolving domain.

data.title: Stena RoRo orders two C-Flexer RoRo vessels with option for four more, marking a historic move in the company's strategy.
data.description: In Sweden's Gothenburg, on January 28, 2026, Stena RoRo announced a significant order for the next-gen RoRo vessels. The order includes two confirmed C-Flexer vessels with the potential for four more in the future. This order is a key development in Stena RoRo's strategic plan, underscoring their commitment to innovation and growth in the maritime industry.

data.title: US seizure-linked wallet launches memecoin on Pump.fun, crashes 97%, raising tokenomics concerns.
data.description: A digital wallet connected to a suspected seizure of cryptocurrency by the US government introduced a meme coin on Pump.fun within the Solana network. However, the coin's value plummeted by 97%, leading to concerns about its tokenomics.

data.title: Vanuatu Prime Minister Jotham Napat Nauka leads delegation to HK to discuss future relationship; conference held.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Hong Kong, a notable visit took place by the Hon. Prime Minister of the Republic of Vanuatu, Jotham Napat Nauka, accompanied by a senior government delegation. The purpose was to discuss and strategize on the "Future and Development of Vanuatu–Hong Kong Relationship" for the year 2026 and beyond. This event aimed to strengthen ties and enhance cooperation between the two parties.

data.title: SK hynix launching U.S. arm 'AI Company' for AI solutions, targeting global market growth. Aims to accelerate AI advancement.
data.description: AI Company is positioning itself as a crucial player in the AI data center ecosystem. Serving as the central hub for SK Group's AI initiatives, the company is dedicated to driving the progress of AI technology worldwide, with a focus on markets in the United States and South Korea. As part of this commitment, SK hynix, a subsidiary of AI Company, will be taking proactive measures to capitalize on the opportunities presented by the emerging AI era.
